Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates that the patient has been diagnosed with "Mixed hyperlipidemia." This diagnosis is a clear indication of a lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." The presence of this diagnosis suggests that the patient has an existing lipid metabolism issue that is likely to be actively managed or monitored in future visits. Therefore, it is reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the patient's next hospital visit.
